allow: Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:zouqingshan2017@localhost:5432/ad_fontes-test -c "SELECT to_regclass\('public.words_v2'\) IS NOT NULL AS exists;")
Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:zouqingshan2017@localhost:5432/ad_fontes-test -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\), language FROM words_v2 GROUP BY language;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:zouqingshan2017@localhost:5432/ad_fontes-test -c "SELECT lemma, language, jsonb_pretty\(content\)->'yield'->'lemma' AS yaml_lemma, jsonb_pretty\(content\)->'etymology' IS NOT NULL AS has_etymology, jsonb_pretty\(content\)->'cognate_family' IS NOT NULL AS has_cognates FROM words_v2 LIMIT 3;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:zouqingshan2017@localhost:5432/ad_fontes-test -c "SELECT lemma, language, content->'yield'->>'lemma' AS yaml_lemma, \(content->'etymology'\) IS NOT NULL AS has_etymology, \(content->'cognate_family'\) IS NOT NULL AS has_cognates FROM words_v2 LIMIT 3;")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/ad_fontes.db'\); const count = db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM words_v2'\).get\(\); console.log\('words_v2 row count:', count.cnt\); const byLang = db.prepare\('SELECT language, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM words_v2 GROUP BY language'\).all\(\); console.log\('by language:', JSON.stringify\(byLang\)\); db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/ad_fontes.db'\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).all\(\); console.log\('Tables:', JSON.stringify\(tables.map\(t=>t.name\)\)\); db.close\(\);")
